creator: freebsd@simweb.ch
text:
Created attachment 169531
Update net-mgmt/lldpd to 0.9.2

Hi there

lldpd has gotten a small bump to 0.9.2.

The diff has been "poudriere testport"-ed on 9.3-amd64/i386 and 10.2-amd64/i386 jails as well as a quick runtime test against an actual LLDP neighbor on 10.2-amd64. Before you ask: Yes I haven't yet upgraded this build box to 10.3, but will soon-ish. ;-)

Looking forward for integration.

-- Mathieu
